findings.evidence_context: README cookbook example for `auth-admin lookup`: 'supabase-pp-cli auth-admin lookup user@example.com --context-table profiles --context-key user_id --json'. Standards-reserved @example.com TLD (RFC 2606) used as the email placeholder argument for the command.
SKILL recipe showing the `auth-admin lookup` invocation with --context-table/--context-key flags; uses the RFC 2606 reserved user@example.com address as the lookup target for documentation.

SKILL agent-mode recipe demonstrating `auth-admin lookup ... --agent --select user.id,user.email,user.last_sign_in_at,context.tier`; the address is the standards-reserved synthetic placeholder for the email positional argument.
